productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Boys Printed Yellow T-Shirt
description: Style Note Stretchy and comfy room-to-grow style tee from Gini and Jony, a pint-sized version of his dad's T-shirt. The go-to piece for summertime games and fun, this tee will last longer than his scruffy escapades! Product Details Yellow round neck T-shirt, has short sleeves and South Africa print on the chest Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach or soak Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery
